name: Clarity Health
description: Bright, blue-forward medical cannabis storefront for adults 40+. Evidence-led, doctor-first, designed to feel more like a private clinic than a dispensary.
features: Split-image hero with clinician + lab + product photography
Bento conditions grid covering pain, mental health, sleep and GI
Dark navy CTA gradient anchored against bright body sections
Plus Jakarta Sans + Geist type pairing — modern and clinical
author: Bubstacks Platform
